title: Crimson Starfish Fragile Tape | 6 x Low Noise Fragile Packing Tape | 48mm x 66m Fragile Tape Rolls | Packing Tape Strong for Moving House, Packing Parcels, Cardboard Boxes & Cartons
features: SAFE SECURITY FOR YOUR FRAGILES: Crimson Starfish proudly present our fragile tape for packaging that requires handling with extra care. Our thick, clear packaging tape is imprinted with 'FRAGILE' across the body of the tape in emboldened, bright red letters ensuring it is crystal clear that the contents of the box should be handled delicately. Our fragile tape is thick, strong, and durable to ensure the safe sealing of your boxing and packaging.

UNMATCHED VALUE: We are incredibly proud of the superior quality and value of our fragile tape. Our packing tape's value is unparalleled. Crimson Starfish's fragile tape rolls are suitable for the toughest of tasks. Our fragile tape is adroitly designed for long-term storage & made with a water based acrylic glue that creates an everlasting hold power. Our fragile tape is expertly resistant to ageing, yellowing, weathering & discoloration.

PERFECT PACKAGING TOOL: With our brilliant fragile tape packaging and sealing is a seamless, uncomplicated task. Our packing tape rolls are equipped with low static coating for effortless unwinding meaning you will never have to contend with a tangled mess of tape! Crimson Starfish's fragile tapes are incredibly versatile and can be used for packing boxes for moving house, e-commerce and drop shipping, or simply due to the immense longevity of our tape, secure long-term storage.

STOCK UP FOR SUPERIOR SAFE SEALING: Crimson Starfish's fragile tape are the leading tape for sealing, reinforcing, protecting and thus we have made it easier to stock up! Every order includes six premium fragile tape rolls ensuring you never run low and can continuously seal with unmatched adhesive. Each roll measures 48mm x 66m and is designed to work seamlessly with most tape dispensers.

OUR CUSTOMERS ARE LIKE FAMILY: Our customers are at the very heart of our family-run business and deeply important to us. We wholeheartedly care about all of our customers and thus your satisfaction is absolute priority to Crimson Starfish. Please don't hesitate to reach out to us with any questions or feedback you may have - we love hearing from you! Invest in strength and resilient products, and browse our range of premium tapes and packaging suppliers!
